creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
Argh, turns out I was visiting http://pocketmine.net which is broken but http://www.pocketmine.net works..

Although their forums are broken too and it looks like the project got forked to https://github.com/pmmp/pocketmine-mp

I'll leave it as closed for now and will see if I can get time to look at it later.
